Legerity.Uno.PageObjectGenerator 0.1.1+b8d7181abd03192f8bcacf2cba9b4beb8f910279
Copyright (C) MADE Apps. All rights reserved.

  -i, --input        The path to the folder where platform pages exist that will
                     be generating page objects for. Default to the executing
                     folder.

  -o, --output       The path to the folder where the generated page object
                     files should be stored. Default to the 'Generated' folder
                     in the executing folder.

  -n, --namespace    The namespace to apply to the output page objects. Default
                     to 'LegerityUnoTests.Pages'.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
